'''sagoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oat|oat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oat|oat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sagoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sægeyeth|sægeyeth]] || [[word:sægeyej|sægeyej]] || [[word:sægeyesh|sægeyesh]] || [[word:sægeye|sægeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sagogoyoth|sagogoyoth]] || [[word:sagogoyoj|sagogoyoj]] || [[word:sagogoyosh|sagogoyosh]] || [[word:sagogoyo|sagogoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sagoyoth|sagoyoth]] || [[word:sagoyoj|sagoyoj]] || [[word:sagoyosh|sagoyosh]] || [[word:sagoyo|sagoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sagofyofth|sagofyofth]] || [[word:sagofyofj|sagofyofj]] || [[word:sagofyofsh|sagofyofsh]] || [[word:sagofyof|sagofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sagoyotho|sagoyotho]] || [[word:sagoyojo|sagoyojo]] || [[word:sagoyosho|sagoyosho]] || [[word:sagoyoko|sagoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sagoyoth|sagoyoth]] || [[word:sagoyoj|sagoyoj]] || [[word:sagoyosh|sagoyosh]] || [[word:sagoyo|sagoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sagoyothol|sagoyothol]] || [[word:sagoyojol|sagoyojol]] || [[word:sagoyoshol|sagoyoshol]] || [[word:sagoyokol|sagoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sagoyoothotho|sagoyoothotho]] || [[word:sagoyoojojo|sagoyoojojo]] || [[word:sagoyooshosho|sagoyooshosho]] || [[word:sagoyooko|sagoyooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sagoyothon|sagoyothon]] || [[word:sagoyojon|sagoyojon]] || [[word:sagoyoshon|sagoyoshon]] || [[word:sagoyokon|sagoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sagoyothooro|sagoyothooro]] || [[word:sagoyojooro|sagoyojooro]] || [[word:sagoyoshooro|sagoyoshooro]] || [[word:sagoyokooro|sagoyokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
